case_title: LORINCZ, JENO E. DBA ROOFTOP CONDOMINIUMS VS WATSON, STEVEN T. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $446.00 FILED BY LORINCZ, JENO E. DBA ROOFTOP CONDOMINIUMS AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, STEVEN T. CROCKER, ARMEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $446.00 FILED BY WATSON, STEVEN T. CROCKER, ARMEL A. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LORINCZ, JENO E. DBA ROOFTOP CONDOMINIUMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, STEVEN T. CROCKER, ARMEL A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LORINCZ, JENO E. DBA ROOFTOP CONDOMINIUMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATSON, STEVEN T. CROCKER, ARMEL A. $96.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $111.00, LANDLORD IS RESPONSIBLE FOR LOSS INCURRED BY TENANTS, BUT DAMAGES SHOULD NOT BE CALCULATED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WATSON, STEVEN T. CROCKER, ARMEL A. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LORINCZ, JENO E. DBA ROOFTOP CONDOMINIUMS $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $365.00, TENANTS MAY WITHOLD RENT BUT ONLY THE EXTENT OF $350. BALANCE TO BE PAID AS RENT ($96). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
